name: Stormshield 2.5L Waterproof Rain Jacket
description: Fully seam-sealed 2.5-layer waterproof shell with pit zips and an adjustable storm hood. Packs into its own pocket. Ideal for hiking and travel in wet, windy conditions.

name: Summit 800 Down Insulated Jacket
description: Lightweight 800-fill responsibly sourced down jacket for cold-weather camping and alpine starts. Highly compressible with an insulated hood.

name: Basecamp Merino Wool Base Layer Top
description: Soft 100% merino wool long-sleeve base layer that regulates temperature and resists odor on multi-day trips. Wear next to skin under a shell or down jacket.

name: Ridgeline GTX Waterproof Hiking Boots
description: Waterproof leather hiking boots with a Vibram outsole and ankle support for rough terrain. Breathable membrane keeps feet dry on stream crossings.

name: Swiftpath Trail Running Shoes
description: Lightweight, breathable trail runners with aggressive lugs for grip on technical singletrack. Rock plate protects underfoot on long efforts.

name: Horizon 2P Three-Season Tent
description: Freestanding two-person backpacking tent with two doors and vestibules. Weighs just 1.9 kg packed and pitches in minutes. A complete shelter for weekend trips.

name: Dreamloft -7C Mummy Sleeping Bag
description: Warm synthetic mummy sleeping bag rated to -7C with a draft collar and contoured hood. Compresses into the included stuff sack for easy packing.

name: Cloudbase Inflatable Sleeping Pad
description: Insulated inflatable sleeping pad with an R-value of 4.2 for comfort on cold ground. Inflates in under two minutes with the integrated pump sack.

name: Blaze Compact Backpacking Stove
description: Ultralight canister stove that boils a litre of water in about three minutes. Folds small enough to fit inside a mug. Reliable for trailside meals and coffee.

name: Mess Pro Anodized Cookware Set
description: Two-pot hard-anodized aluminium cookware set with folding handles and a strainer lid. Nests together with a stove and fuel inside for a tidy kitchen kit.

name: Lumen 400 Rechargeable Headlamp
description: USB-C rechargeable headlamp with 400 lumens, a red night mode, and a lock-out to prevent accidental drain. Essential for camp chores and night hikes.

name: PureFlow Squeeze Water Filter
description: Hollow-fiber squeeze water filter that removes 99.99% of bacteria and protozoa. Screws onto standard bottles so you can drink straight from streams.

name: Carbon Z Folding Trekking Poles
description: Lightweight carbon trekking poles that fold to 38 cm and lock instantly. Cork grips wick sweat; carbide tips bite on rock and ice.

name: Voyager 65L Backpacking Pack
description: Adjustable 65-litre internal-frame backpack with a ventilated back panel, rain cover, and load-lifting hip belt. Carries multi-day loads in comfort.

name: Trailmate 18L Hydration Daypack
description: Compact 18-litre daypack with an included 2L hydration reservoir and a sternum strap. Perfect for day hikes, trail runs, and travel.

name: SunCell 21W Portable Solar Charger
description: Foldable 21-watt solar panel with dual USB outputs to recharge phones, headlamps, and power banks off-grid. Weather-resistant for multi-day trips.

name: PowerRock 20000mAh Rugged Power Bank
description: Shockproof and splash-resistant 20000mAh power bank with fast USB-C PD charging and a built-in flashlight. Keeps devices alive for a long weekend.

name: Trailguard Compact First Aid Kit
description: Lightweight 90-piece first aid kit in a water-resistant zip case, covering blisters, cuts, and sprains. A must-have safety item for any outing.
